curation_notes: The openssl-src-rs patch (4a31c14) bumps the vendored OpenSSL submodule from 3.0.6 to 3.0.7. The actual code fix is in the OpenSSL repo at commit fe3b639dc19b325846f4f6801f2f4604f56e3de3, which changes a single line in crypto/punycode.c: the bounds check 'written_out > max_out' is corrected to 'written_out >= max_out' in the ossl_punycode_decode function. This off-by-one allowed one unsigned int to be written past the buffer boundary. Pre-assigned class buffer-overflow is correct per CWE-120/CWE-787 and the patch diff. No sibling files share this vulnerability pattern.
